note: Bumped 2026-05-26 from 281 KB → 282 KB to absorb the spec-canonical postMessage resolver chain in `bootSequence` (#143) — bootSequence now races a `ui/notifications/tool-result` listener (MCP-Apps SEP-1865) against synchronous Reading-B + inline-global tiers, and the autostart layer threads pre-resolved postMessage meta through `runBootProduction(preResolvedMeta)` so spec-strict hosts (`<AppRenderer>` from `@mcp-ui/client`, ChatGPT MCP-Apps connector) don't re-await the same notification inside bootSequence. ~100 bytes gz for the new resolver chain + preResolvedMeta plumbing + independent hostContext projection. Prior bump 2026-05-23 (280 KB → 281 KB): @ggui-ai/wire's new dispatch-dedup module (~150 bytes gz) — the task-scoped duplicate-dispatch defense in `useAction` that closes the scenario-7 double-fire bug class. Prior bump 2026-05-14 (228 KB → 280 KB): absorbed Ajv 8 + ajv-formats (~31 KB gz) for the closed-shape validator the iframe runs symmetrically with the server. Load-bearing contributors: React 19 ~115 KB, zod + JSON-Schema processors ~60 KB, protocol root-barrel leak ~15 KB, Ajv ~31 KB, design + wire ~60 KB.
